summary: Hamilton's arrival at Ferrari ignites the Scuderia's championship charge as the seven-time world champion hunts down the front-running McLarens after his breakthrough Spanish victory. Alpine's resurgent pace and Mercedes' unpredictable form create a fierce midfield battle that could reshape the constructors' standings. A dominant performance would signal Ferrari's arrival as genuine title contenders, while a faltering result risks squandering the momentum Hamilton's presence generated heading into the summer break.
